name: Sauce Labs Test Cloud API
what_it_does: Cloud-based test execution and analytics platform with REST API — providing real browsers and real devices for Selenium, Appium, Cypress, Playwright, and XCUITest execution at scale, with live test debugging, test analytics, parallel execution, and error classification for web and mobile apps.
use_cases: Running Selenium and Playwright tests against real browsers in the cloud via API
Triggering Appium mobile tests on real iOS and Android devices via REST API
Querying test session results and video recordings for CI/CD failure analysis
Managing test concurrency and parallel execution for faster CI feedback loops
Analyzing flaky test patterns via Sauce Analytics for test suite reliability improvement
not_for: Load and performance testing (use k6, Gatling, or Locust for performance)
best_when: A QA or engineering team needs cross-browser and real-device testing at scale with minimal infrastructure management, supporting major frameworks (Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, Appium).
avoid_when: You primarily use open-source test runners locally, need performance testing, or your test framework is not supported by Sauce Labs.

auth.notes: Username and access key from Sauce Labs account. Basic auth with username and access key (passed as Authorization: Basic base64(username:access_key)). No OAuth2. Data center-specific endpoints (US, EU, APAC). Webhook for test completion events.

pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2008. Acquired by Francisco Partners in 2017. 4,000+ browser/OS combinations. 2,000+ real mobile devices. Selenium WebDriver grid pioneer. Integrations with major CI platforms. Sauce Analytics for test intelligence. Real device cloud unique differentiator vs virtual only.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrency limits per plan; documented per data center

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for test jobs, assets, tunnels, accounts, and real devices. Basic auth with username:access_key. Excellent documentation. Data center-specific endpoints (US, EU). Test assets (video, logs, screenshots) queryable by job ID. Sauce Connect tunnel management via API. Concurrency limits enforced per plan.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Job reads fully idempotent. Asset downloads idempotent by job ID. Account reads idempotent. Device reservation reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Data center-specific endpoints — must use correct US, EU, or APAC URL for your account
Basic auth encodes username:access_key in base64 — not API key alone
Concurrency limits per plan — queue management required for large test suites
Sauce Connect tunnel required for testing private apps not exposed to internet
Real device sessions have setup time overhead vs virtual browser sessions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Basic auth with username/access_key. Test scripts may contain app credentials — use secure storage. Video recordings of test sessions are sensitive. Data center selection for compliance requirements.
